properties.name: argus.enabled
properties.description: Whether ARGUS starter auto-configuration is enabled.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.chunk-size
properties.description: Fixed chunk size used by the default chunk strategy.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.embedding-dimension
properties.description: Vector dimension used by the default deterministic embedding model.

properties.name: argus.ingestion.vector-namespace
properties.description: Namespace assigned to the default in-memory vector store.

properties.name: argus.fetch.replay-mode
properties.description: Replay execution mode used by the default fetch executor.

properties.name: argus.fetch.record-store.type
properties.description: Record store backend used by the default replay store.

properties.name: argus.fetch.record-store.file-path
properties.description: Optional file path used when the replay store type is FILE.

properties.name: argus.fetch.policy.allowed-protocols
properties.description: Allowed fetch protocol names. Empty means no protocol restriction.

properties.name: argus.fetch.policy.rate-limit
properties.description: Minimum interval between live requests to the same resource.

properties.name: argus.fetch.policy.obey-robots-txt
properties.description: Whether robots.txt should be fetched and enforced before accessing HTTP resources.

properties.name: argus.fetch.policy.user-agent
properties.description: User-Agent used when evaluating robots.txt rules.

properties.name: argus.fetch.policy.robots-cache-ttl
properties.description: Cache duration for parsed robots.txt rules.
